params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Dine. Focus tightly on: dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round oak dining table, rattan pendant, linen-upholstered chairs. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm Japandi interior that balances Scandinavian minimalism and Japanese restraint with warm, earthy materials. Emphasis on low, horizontal furniture lines, layered natural textures (wood, linen, woven rattan), and a restrained palette of warm neutrals to create a cozy, meditative home for a young family. Integrate a small work corner in the living area and a crib in the bedroom while keeping clutter minimal. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
